name: pff_team_grades_offense range year_offset averages the grade window
description: pff_team_grades_offense renders via a custom main_select; for a range year_offset that alias is dropped (skip_join_for_offset_range), so the offset path emits a self-contained correlated subquery. Grades are 0-100 quality scores, so the window reduces with AVG.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(pff_team_seasonlogs.grades_offense) FROM pff_team_seasonlogs WHERE pff_team_seasonlogs.nfl_team = player.current_nfl_team AND pff_team_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_team_grades_offense_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
